title: alaticaulia cuprea
intro: Alaticaulia cuprea, also known as Cuprea, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Rubiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues. Alaticaulia cuprea can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional medicine.
